title: Built to move you from raw input to usable understanding fast.
subtitle: The sequence matters more than the spectacle. Each step has one job, one output, and one clean handoff to the next so the page feels deliberate instead of overloaded.

01.title: Drop in any source
01.description: Upload PDFs, DOCX files, lecture notes, or links and let Docipy normalize messy inputs automatically.
01.outcome: Every source is cleaned into one readable, searchable system instead of scattered raw files.

02.title: Watch AI map the meaning
02.description: The engine extracts concepts, connects related ideas, and builds a searchable layer of knowledge over every page.
02.outcome: Concepts, relationships, and important passages become structured objects you can actually navigate.

03.title: Study, search, and decide faster
03.description: Move from static documents to summaries, quizzes, flashcards, and document chat without switching tools.
03.outcome: The output feels like a working product surface, not a dead archive you have to reread from scratch.
